SAMP_TOP.description: Depth to top of test sample

CONS_IVR.description: Voids ratio at start of increment

CONS_INCF.description: Stress at end of stress increment/decrement

CONS_INCE.description: Voids ratio at end of stress increment

CONS_INMV.description: Reported coefficient of volume compressibility over stress increment

CONS_INCV.description: Reported coefficient of consolidation over stress increment

CONS_INSC.description: Coefficient of secondary compression over stress increment

?CONS_CVRT.description: Coefficient of consolidation determined by the root time method

?CONS_CVLG.description: Coefficient of consolidation determined by the log time method

?CONS_REM.description: Remarks including method used to determine coefficients reported under CONS_INMV and selected CONS_INCV (from either of ?CONS_CVRT or ?CONS_CVLG)

CORE_TOP.description: Depth to top of core run

CORE_RQD.description: Rock quality designation for core run (RQD)

DETL_TOP.description: Depth to top of detail description

DETL_BASE.description: Depth to base of detail description
